allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; 'Dev server stopped'")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object ProcessName, Handles, CPU, Memory")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; 'Server stopped'")
